name: oss-anki
description: Open-source, framework-free implementation of Anki: a precise FSRS-6 / SM-2 spaced-repetition core with full .apkg/.colpkg interop.
author: Phylliida Dev
comment: The core (fsrs, sm2, model) has ZERO runtime dependencies. Interop (.apkg/.colpkg read/write) will add sql.js, fflate, and fzstd as optional deps once those modules land.
